name: DevEx Resources Limited
description: DevEx Resources Limited is an Australian-based exploration company focused on the discovery of high-grade mineral deposits in world-class provinces. The company's key projects include the Nabarlek Uranium Project in the Northern Territory, which surrounds the historic Nabarlek Uranium Mine, and the Sovereign Nickel-Copper-PGE Project in Western Australia. DevEx is actively exploring for uranium, copper, gold, and nickel-copper-platinum group elements (PGE) to build a high-value portfolio of mineral discoveries.
